The retained evidence only shows the email as a generic page contact on the municipal website: the page title is "Enying város honlapja - Egészségügyi szolgáltatók" and the email appears only as "pmhiv@enying.eu" with context "E-mail küldés". There is no explicit tie to "Dr. Farkas Csilla", her legal practice, or an unambiguous provider section for the target clinic.
